question: Is the gallery space and floor rendered in an isometric minimalist vector illustration style (flat colors, clean geometric lines, parallel perspective)?
Does the central marble sculpture exhibit a realistic carved stone texture, distinct from the surrounding vector environment?
Are the two visitors rendered in a black-and-white manga ink-line style?
Is the small patrol drone rendered in an origami paper-folding style with visible creases and paper texture?
Does the framed painting on the wall exhibit an Impressionist oil painting style with visible brushstrokes?
Is the content on the smartphone screen rendered in a claymation stop-motion animation style (clay-like texture/modeling)?
Are there clear, sharp boundaries where objects of different styles meet (e.g., no unintended blending between the realistic sculpture and vector floor)?
Is the claymation style content on the smartphone screen visually distinct from the manga ink-line style of the visitor holding it?
Is one visitor depicted raising a hand and making a V-sign gesture?
Is the other visitor depicted leaning sideways and peeking?
Does the smartphone screen display a selfie showing the visitor with the sculpture?
Are fingers shown partially obscuring the content on the smartphone screen?
